  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales & Digital Marketing Associate (Solar Energy Solutions)",
  "description": "Tojan Technologies Limited, in strategic partnership with Dynacon Synergy Limited is a dynamic and forward-thinking enterprise at the forefront of Nigeria&rsquo;s transition to clean, reliable power. Headquartered in Abuja, we specialize in the importation, distribution, and expert installation of premium solar energy systems, renewable energy solutions, and smart facility automation.

As the official Authorized Dealer for the globally recognized&nbsp;WHC Solar Technology, we bring world-class, tier-one solar components directly from the manufacturer to the Nigerian market. From advanced Hybrid Inverters to state-of-the-art Lithium-ion Powerwalls, we provide high-capacity, zero-noise energy solutions to residential estates, commercial plazas, government agencies, and NGOs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales &amp; Digital Marketing Associate (Solar Energy Solutions)

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are scaling up a state-of-the-art Solar Experience Center in Abuja, backed by a direct authorized dealership with a leading global manufacturer.
	We need a charismatic, tech-savvySales Associateto be the face of our showroom and the driver of our online brand.
	Working directly under the General Manager, you will take high-net-worth clients and corporate visitors on a journey through our premium solar energy products.
	You will also be aggressively driving our sales through social media and digital marketing campaigns.


The Ideal Candidate


	Exceptionally clear and confident communicator.
	Proven experience in a marketing or retail sales role.
	Highly skilled in social media management, content creation, and closing sales online (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter).
	Fast learner, highly trainable, and eager to master renewable energy technologies (Lithium batteries, Hybrid Inverters, and comprehensive solar setups).
	A self-starter who thrives in a commission-incentivized, target-driven environment.


Remuneration
Highly Attractive Base Salary (N1,800,000 - N3,000,000 annually)&nbsp;+ Uncapped Sales Incentives.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV and your social media handles / portfolio to:&nbsp;tojansystems@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Application: Sales Associate - Abuja&quot; as the subject of the mail.

Note: If you have the charm to close a walk-in client and the digital skills to generate appreciable online leads a day, send your applications.",

Sales & Digital Marketing Associate (Solar Energy Solutions) Job at Tojan Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Tojan Technologies Limited, in strategic partnership with Dynacon Synergy Limited is a dynamic and forward-thinking enterprise at the forefront of Nigeria’s transition to clean, reliable power. Headquartered in Abuja, we specialize in the importation, distribution, and expert installation of premium solar energy systems, renewable energy solutions, and smart facility automation.

As the official Authorized Dealer for the globally recognized WHC Solar Technology, we bring world-class, tier-one solar components directly from the manufacturer to the Nigerian market. From advanced Hybrid Inverters to state-of-the-art Lithium-ion Powerwalls, we provide high-capacity, zero-noise energy solutions to residential estates, commercial plazas, government agencies, and NGOs.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales & Digital Marketing Associate (Solar Energy Solutions)

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are scaling up a state-of-the-art Solar Experience Center in Abuja, backed by a direct authorized dealership with a leading global manufacturer.
	We need a charismatic, tech-savvySales Associateto be the face of our showroom and the driver of our online brand.
	Working directly under the General Manager, you will take high-net-worth clients and corporate visitors on a journey through our premium solar energy products.
	You will also be aggressively driving our sales through social media and digital marketing campaigns.


The Ideal Candidate


	Exceptionally clear and confident communicator.
	Proven experience in a marketing or retail sales role.
	Highly skilled in social media management, content creation, and closing sales online (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter).
	Fast learner, highly trainable, and eager to master renewable energy technologies (Lithium batteries, Hybrid Inverters, and comprehensive solar setups).
	A self-starter who thrives in a commission-incentivized, target-driven environment.


Remuneration
Highly Attractive Base Salary (N1,800,000 - N3,000,000 annually) + Uncapped Sales Incentives.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should their CV and your social media handles / portfolio to: [email protected] using "Application: Sales Associate - Abuja" as the subject of the mail.

Note: If you have the charm to close a walk-in client and the digital skills to generate appreciable online leads a day, send your applications.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Vacancies at Weatherford
content:
Weatherford is one of the largest multinational oilfield service companies providing innovative solutions, technology and services to the oil and gas industry. The Company operates in over 90 countries and has a network of approximately 800 locations, including manufacturing, service, research and development, and training facilities.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Operations Supervisor, Liner Hanger Systems & Cementation

Job Identification: 104475
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Job Schedule: Full time
Job Category: Operations Management

Job Purpose
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Weatherford have an excellent opportunity for an experienced Operations Supervisor Liner Hanger Systems & Cementation to join the team in Port Harcourt, Nigeria.
	The Operations Supervisor LHS & CEM will manage field operations for liner hanger systems and cementation services with responsibility for safety, quality, and financial performance.
	This role requires strategic leadership in operations management, risk assessment, service quality, and business development.
	This role requires a technically skilled leader who is process driven and quality focused that can balance operational excellence with financial performance while maintaining the highest standards of safety and service quality in Weatherford's liner hanger and cementation business in Nigeria.


Responsibilities
Safety & Compliance:


	Lead regular safety meetings and oversee Job Hazard Analysis.
	Conduct incident investigations and implement corrective actions.
	Ensure compliance with Weatherford's HSE policies and industry regulations.
	Prioritize quality, health, safety, and environmental protection as core values.


Operations Management:


	Execute operational activities with focus on resource optimization and EBITDA improvement.
	Ensure high-quality service delivery and customer satisfaction.
	Maintain equipment according to technical specifications.
	Oversee job documentation and performance tracking.
	Support technical requirements before, during, and after jobs.


Financial Responsibility:


	Forecast activity trends and maximize financial results.
	Implement effective cost management practices.
	Ensure proper contract execution to minimize revenue leakage.


People Management:


	Lead field personnel by clearly communicating expectations and responsibilities.
	Drive performance management through objective setting and regular appraisals.
	Collaborate with HR on recruitment and retention strategies.
	Support talent development and succession planning.


Customer & Communication:


	Build and maintain strong customer relationships.
	Partner with sales to identify new business opportunities.
	Facilitate collaboration between departments.
	Maintain effective communication with all stakeholders.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Engineering or scientific discipline (or equivalent experience).
	Minimum 7+ years of relevant operations experience.
	Comprehensive understanding of liner hanger systems and cementation operations.
	Strong leadership and team management abilities.
	Problem-solving and strategic thinking capabilities.
	Experience with Microsoft Office Suite.
	Fluency in English.
	Ability to work effectively in high-pressure situations.


Application Closing Date: 17th April, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

 

2.) Technical Sales Manager, Completions

Job Identification: 104950
Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Job Schedule: Full time
Job Category: Sales

Job Overview


	Weatherford International is seeking an experienced Technical Sales Manager specializing in Completions to join our dynamic team in Lagos, Nigeria.
	This role combines technical expertise in oil and gas completions technology with strategic sales leadership to drive revenue growth and expand Weatherford's market presence in the region.   


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement strategic sales plans to achieve revenue targets for Weatherford's completions product lines in Nigeria and surrounding regions.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with key decision-makers at major oil and gas operators, providing technical solutions to meet their completions challenges.
	Lead technical presentations, product demonstrations, and field trials to showcase Weatherford's completions technologies.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams including engineering, operations, and marketing to develop customized solutions for clients.
	Provide detailed technical guidance on completions equipment selection, installation procedures, and operational best practices.
	Analyze market trends, competitor activities, and customer needs to identify new business opportunities.
	Prepare comprehensive technical and commercial proposals, including detailed cost estimates and project timelines.
	Negotiate contracts and service agreements with clients, ensuring favorable terms while maintaining strong customer relationships.
	Monitor project execution to ensure customer satisfaction and identify opportunities for additional services.
	Mentor and develop junior technical sales staff, building a high-performing team.
	Maintain accurate sales forecasts and activity reports using CRM systems.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Petroleum Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or related technical field; advanced degree preferred.
	7-10 years of experience in the oil and gas industry, with at least 5 years in completions technology sales or operations.
	Demonstrated technical expertise in completions equipment and services, including sand control, liner hangers, packers, flow control devices, and intelligent completions.
	Proven track record of achieving sales targets and growing market share in the oil and gas sector.
	Strong understanding of West African oil and gas market dynamics, particularly in Nigeria.
	Experience working with major international and national oil companies operating in Nigeria.
	Excellent presentation, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.
	Strong analytical abilities and business acumen.
	Proficiency with CRM systems, Microsoft Office suite, and technical software.
	Willingness to travel extensively within Nigeria and occasionally internationally.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.


Preferred:


	Experience with Weatherford's completions product lines and services.
	Knowledge of local content requirements and business practices in Nigeria.
	Understanding of HSSE policies and procedures in oilfield operations.
	Experience working in challenging environments and remote locations.
	Familiarity with deepwater and shallow water completions technologies.
	Professional certifications relevant to completions engineering or sales management.


Application Closing Date: 17th April, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

 

3.) Operations & Administrative Assistant

Job Location: Lagos-Ikosi off CMD Road, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Start Date: Immediate

Job Summary


	We are seeking a smart, organized, and proactive fresh graduate to join our team of our client as an Operations & Administrative Assistant.
	The role involves supporting daily administrative operations, managing communications, assisting with platform administration, and helping with social media activities.
	Training will be provided, so the ideal candidate should be willing to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment.


Responsibilities


	Monitor and respond to company emails and inquiries
	Receive and manage incoming phone calls professionally
	Assist with administrative tasks and office coordination
	Support social media posting and basic content scheduling
	Help manage platform activities through the admin portal (e.g., reviewing and approving user registrations)
	Maintain organized records and assist with general operational tasks
	Escalate important issues or requests to management when necessary.


Skills:


	Good written and spoken English
	Basic computer skills (email, Microsoft Office, internet use)
	Good organizational and time-management skills
	Professional phone etiquette
	Ability to learn quickly and follow instructions
	Attention to detail.


Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized university
	Candidate must have completed NYSC.


Experience:


	No formal work experience required
	Internship or administrative experience is an advantage.


Requirements:


	Fresh graduate who has completed NYSC
	Must be organized, reliable, and professional
	Ability to start immediately
	Based in Lagos.


Remuneration


	N130,000 monthly salary
	Opportunity to gain practical experience in a growing digital business
	Training and professional development will be provided.


Application Closing Date: 16th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a short cover email explaining why they are interested in the role to: [email protected] using "Application – Operations & Administrative Assistant" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

     

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Controller (FINCON)

Job Location:&nbsp;Central Business District, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Financial Controller to join our finance team in a reputable financial institution, successful candidate will.


	Manage and reconcile financial transactions and accounts
	Prepare and review financial reports and statements
	Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements
	Analyze financial data and provide recommendations
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive business decisions


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Accounting or related field with a minimum 4 years of experience in accounting or finance
	Professional certification (ACCA, ICAN, etc.) is an advantage
	Strong analytical, communication, and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in financial software and Microsoft Office.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development
	Dynamic and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter and Curriculum Vitae (CV) in PDF or MS Word format to:&nbsp;hrrecruitment@tridentmfb.com&nbsp;using &quot;Financial Controller&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Financial Controller (FINCON) Job at Trident Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        Trident Micro Finance Bank Limited  is a financial Institution incorporated to provide financial services to those person(s) or business (es) that are traditionally not served or under-served by the conventional commercial banks. Trident MFB are also positioned to meet the needs of these emerging businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Controller (FINCON)

Job Location: Central Business District, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Financial Controller to join our finance team in a reputable financial institution, successful candidate will.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage and reconcile financial transactions and accounts
	Prepare and review financial reports and statements
	Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements
	Analyze financial data and provide recommendations
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive business decisions


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Accounting or related field with a minimum 4 years of experience in accounting or finance
	Professional certification (ACCA, ICAN, etc.) is an advantage
	Strong analytical, communication, and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in financial software and Microsoft Office.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits package
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development
	Dynamic and collaborative work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter and Curriculum Vitae (CV) in PDF or MS Word format to: [email protected] using "Financial Controller" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
